commands.help_message:
To report and delete a spam or unwanted message, group members can reply to it with the word: {{banKeyword}}

How it works:
• Each user has 1 unique vote per message.
• Upon reaching {{requiredVotes}} votes, the message is automatically deleted.
• Administrators can then evaluate the case with options to view or restore the message, ban the user who sent it, or ignore the report.
commands.i18n_menu_prompt: 🌍 Select the language for this group:
commands.faq_invalid_format: Invalid format or non-existent link. Use: /faq keyword https://t.me/group/id
commands.faq_trigger_reply_required: To display a FAQ, reply to a message with: /faq keyword
commands.features_description: Tap an option to enable or disable that feature in this group.
commands.menu_moderation_desc: Reply to any message with `{{banKeyword}}` to start a removal vote. Upon reaching {{requiredVotes}} votes, the message is deleted, the suspicious user is muted, and admins are notified.
commands.menu_faq_add: `/faq keyword link` — Register a quick answer (admins only).
commands.menu_faq_list: `/faqs` — List all FAQs for this group.
commands.menu_faq_remove: `/faq rm keyword` — Remove a FAQ (admins only).
commands.menu_faq_trigger: Reply to a message with `/faq keyword` to trigger the corresponding FAQ.
commands.menu_media_desc: Send a photo or video with the caption `/media`. The media will be saved in the official Gallery and the Bot will post the link in the group.
commands.menu_gist_desc: `/gist language code` — Creates a public Gist on GitHub and posts the link in the group.
commands.menu_lang_desc: `/i18n` — Change the bot language for this group (admins only).
commands.menu_features_desc: `/features` — Enable or disable the bot features in this group (admins only).
commands.menu_captcha_desc: New members must complete a captcha before sending messages in the group (when enabled by an admin in `/features`).
commands.menu_welcome_desc: `/welcome` — Set the custom welcome message for the group and preview it in the chat (admins only, when enabled in `/features`).
commands.menu_rules_desc: `/rules message_link` — Set the group rules message link (admins only). Use `/rules` to show the rules button.
commands.menu_chat_create: `/chat` — Creates a new private and temporary chat room.
commands.menu_chat_close: `/chat close` — Closes the current room (creator only).
commands.menu_trust_add: `/trust [ID] [weight]` — Sets a member as trusted and defines their vote weight for the {{banKeyword}} command (admins only). The weight must be between 1 and {{requiredVotes}}.
commands.menu_trust_list: `/trustlist` — Lists all trusted members and their respective vote weights (admins only).
commands.menu_trust_remove: `/untrust [ID]` — Removes trusted member status and resets weight to 1 (admins only).
commands.menu_trust_tag_note: Note: the `VIP` tag is only applied/removed in Telegram if the bot is an admin and has permission to manage member tags.
commands.menu_auto_delete: This message will be automatically deleted in 1 minute to keep the Group clean.
commands.temp_chat_created: ✅ Room {{roomId}} created! Share the link to invite participants. ⏰ Expires in {{minutes}} minutes.
commands.temp_chat_joined: ✅ {{name}}, you joined room {{roomId}}! Send messages here in private chat and everyone will see them. To close: /chat close To leave: /chat exit
commands.temp_chat_user_joined: 👤 {{name}} joined room {{roomId}}. To close: /chat close To leave: /chat exit
commands.temp_chat_full: ❌ This room has reached the maximum number of users.
commands.temp_chat_already_in: ℹ️ You are already in this room.
commands.temp_chat_not_in_room: ℹ️ You are not in any room.
commands.temp_chat_no_permission: ❌ Only the room creator can close the room.
commands.temp_chats_empty: No active rooms at the moment.
commands.temp_chat_expired_notify: ⏰ The room has expired and was automatically closed.
commands.temp_chat_closed_by_owner: ⚠️ This room was closed by the creator.

vote.use_ban_reply: Use {{banKeyword}} replying to the suspicious message.

admin.error_no_restorable_content: No restorable content saved for this type of message.
admin.error_ban_failed_permissions: Failed to ban. Check bot permissions.
admin.user_banned_by_admin: 🔨 {{firstName}} was banned directly by an administrator. Reason: {{reason}}

media.success_posted: 📸 Media successfully posted by {{authorName}} to the official gallery. 🔗 Access Media
media.error_forwarding: ❌ An error occurred while sending your media to our Gallery Channel. Check the Bot console.

gist.error_missing_language: ❌ Please provide the language. Example: /gist python def add(a, b): return a + b
gist.error_missing_code: ❌ Please provide the code after the language. Example: /gist python def add(a, b): return a + b
gist.error_api_failed: ❌ An error occurred while creating the Gist on GitHub. Check the Bot console.

captcha.title: Join captcha
captcha.instructions: Click the emojis in this order:
captcha.locked_notice: Until then, you cannot send messages in the group.
captcha.retry_pending_text: Click the Attempt {{current}} of {{total}} button to generate a new challenge.
captcha.success: Captcha completed. Your permissions were restored.
captcha.welcome: ✅ Welcome, {{name}}! Your access to the group has been granted.
captcha.admin_test_failed:
❌ You failed all 3 attempts to solve the CAPTCHA.

If you were not an ADMIN, you would have been kicked from the group.
captcha.failed: Captcha failed. You were removed from the group.
captcha.error_not_found: This captcha is no longer available.
captcha.error_only_target_user: Only the new member can solve this captcha.

welcome.setup_prompt: Your next message will become this group's welcome message. Available placeholders: {name} {username} {group} Example: Welcome, {name} {username}, to the group {group}!
welcome.setup_prompt_with_current: Your next message will replace this group's current welcome message. Available placeholders: {name} {username} {group} Current welcome message: {{template}}
welcome.saved: Current feature status: {{status}} Enable or disable it in /features.
welcome.preview_ready: ✅ Welcome message preview is ready. {{statusText}} Current template: {{template}}
welcome.preview_only_owner: Only the admin who configured this message can preview it.
welcome.not_configured: No welcome message has been configured yet.
welcome.invalid_template: Send a valid text for the welcome message.

rules.reply_message: Open the group rules using the button below.
rules.invalid_link: Send a valid Telegram message link. Example: /rules https://t.me/your_group/123
rules.not_configured: No rules link has been configured for this group yet.

trust.error_no_reply_or_id: ❌ Reply to a message or provide the user ID.
trust.error_invalid_weight: ❌ Invalid weight. The weight must be a number between 1 and {{requiredVotes}}.
trust.trust_success: 🛡️ {{name}} ({{userId}}) is now a trusted member of this group with vote weight {{weight}}! Applied tag: {{tag}}.
trust.trust_success_tag_pending: 🛡️ {{name}} ({{userId}}) is now a trusted member of this group with vote weight {{weight}}. The {{tag}} tag was not applied in Telegram. Check whether the bot is an admin and has permission to manage tags.
trust.untrust_success: ➖ {{name}} ({{userId}}) removed from the trusted members list. The {{tag}} tag was removed.
trust.untrust_success_tag_pending: ➖ {{name}} ({{userId}}) removed from the trusted members list. The bot could not remove the {{tag}} tag in Telegram. Check whether the bot is an admin and has permission to manage tags.
trust.untrust_not_found: ℹ️ This user is not in the VIP list.

global_ban.admin_only_button: Only administrators can use this button.
